zh.Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Campbell於大約1269年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，她的父親Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell40歲，母親Janet Isabel Sinclair38歲。她於1285年之前與John Mor Earl of Lennox在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年在蘇格蘭享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Campbell于大约1269年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，她的父亲Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell40岁，母亲Janet Isabel Sinclair38岁。她于1285年之前与John Mor Earl of Lennox在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年在苏格兰享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Campbell was born about 1269, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, was 40 and her mother, Janet Isabel Sinclair, was 38. She married John Mor Earl of Lennox before 1285, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1308, in Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Campbell est née environ 1269, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Janet Isabel Sinclair, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé John Mor Earl of Lennox avant 1285, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1308, à Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Campbell um 1269 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell 40 und ihre Mutter Janet Isabel Sinclair 38. Sie hat vor 1285 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland John Mor Earl of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1308 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato John Mor Earl of Lennox prima del 1285, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1308, nel Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Campbellが約1269年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Cailean or Colin Mor Campbellは40歳，母Janet Isabel Sinclairは38歳であった。1285年以前にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでJohn Mor Earl of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年にスコットランドで40歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Campbell(이)가 대략 1269년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Isabel Sinclair(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1285년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 John Mor Earl of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 스컷랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Mor Earl of Lennox antes 1285, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1308, em Scotland, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ro.Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland: Dunglass, East Lothian, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Campbell родилась около 1269 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Isabel Sinclair, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mor Earl of Lennox перед 1285 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1308 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
